prompt: Complete stream_accumulator.h as a SystemC module. The module has sc_fifo_in<int> in and sc_fifo_out<int> out ports. Its SC_THREAD must consume input tokens continuously, accumulate each non-overlapping group of four tokens, write one sum for every complete group, then continue with the next group. Do not emit partial groups. Keep the implementation header-only and preserve the class and port names.
instruction: Implement the SystemC stream accumulator in stream_accumulator.h.
